scenarios.title: ML Experiment Tracking and MLOps Workflows
scenarios.when_to_read: Experiment tracking, AutoML/HPO, model registries, artifacts, sweeps, Launch jobs, MLflow projects/models/evaluation, data versioning pipelines, GenAI observability, local serving, and operational MLOps.
scenarios.role: Use W&B's Python SDK and CLI for experiment tracking, offline/local workflows, artifacts and registries, Public API exports, automations, sweeps, and Launch jobs.
scenarios.read_when: The request names `wandb` or asks for package-specific APIs, CLIs, configs, data/model artifacts, error messages, workflows, or repository maintenance that match this project.
scenarios.best_for: artifacts and registries, cli and local workflows, experiment tracking, public api and automation, and sweeps and launch.
scenarios.avoid_when: another repo skill in this scenario matches the user's task, package, model family, data format, serving backend, or workflow more directly.
scenarios.selection_guidance: Choose `wandb` when the request names `wandb`, centers on experiment tracking, offline/local workflows, artifacts and registries, Public API exports, automations, sweeps, and Launch jobs, uses its APIs or CLIs, references its configs/artifacts/errors, or asks for repository workflows in ml experiment tracking and mlops workflows. Then route to artifacts and registries, CLI and local workflows, experiment tracking, or public API and automation when those focused workflows match.
